meta.pageTitle: Timothy J. Owen — Technical Program Management Resume
meta.notes: TPM profile. Use timowen.me/tpm. This is a transition profile — Tim has no formal program/product manager title. Lead with verified operations/compliance/curriculum leadership, not prior TPM tenure. No PM-specific tooling (Jira, Asana, etc.) should be claimed beyond USER_PROFILE.md's honest qualifiers. Tailor skillGroups order and experience bullets per role before generating docx. Do not import income projections, job-title rankings, or 'Mission Systems Portfolio' framing from the 2026-07-04 multi-LLM career-strategy brainstorm — that source is speculative, not verified against USER_PROFILE.md.

header.name: Timothy J. Owen, D.M.A.
header.subtitle: U.S. Army Veteran (20 Years) · Active Federal Secret Clearance · Technical Program Management

objective: Retired 20-year U.S. Army veteran with an active federal Secret-level security clearance, moving into technical program management. A full parallel career in operations, personnel security records, and curriculum leadership meant coordinating people, schedules, and compliance requirements at scale, the same discipline a technical program manager applies to cross-functional delivery. Completed two consecutive 16-week Washington Vets-to-Tech intensive programs (Server & Cloud Applications, Aug 2025; Cybersecurity, Dec 2025) and a government IT internship, earning CompTIA Network+, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, Foundational C#, and PCEP certifications.

skillGroups.title: Compliance & Records
items: HR & library records management, international assignments

transferableSkills.title: Program Coordination
transferableSkills.description: Coordinated a 40-person organization across 400+ recurring engagements while sustaining 100% readiness, directly applicable to running a technical program with multiple workstreams.

transferableSkills.title: Compliance & Records
transferableSkills.description: Administered personnel security clearance and HR records across international assignments, directly applicable to program governance and audit-ready documentation.

transferableSkills.title: Curriculum Design
transferableSkills.description: Contributed to a 58% training-cycle-time reduction as part of a curriculum team, evidence of process-improvement work at scale.

transferableSkills.title: Cross-Functional Synthesis
transferableSkills.description: Ran a multi-model AI design council to reach a canonical design specification for a personal project, evidence of coordinating multiple inputs toward one technical decision.

bullets: Operated within a strict state data-privacy compliance framework, logging and tracking service requests per agency ISD policy.
Supported account management, software configuration, and workstation setup/imaging for agency staff.
Completed 16-week intensive program earning 18 college credits toward a B.S. in Computer Science; 100% lab completion rate.
Completed 16-week intensive program earning 18 college credits toward a B.S. in Computer Science; 100% lab completion rate.
Led a solo capstone project provisioning a VM via Vagrant with an instructor-template Ansible playbook.

experience.role: Production Manager / Library, Security & Operations Supervisor
bullets: Coordinated a 40-person organization across 400+ public events for audiences totaling 2.5M+, sustaining 100% readiness and managing a large equipment inventory.
Administered personnel security clearance records for 40+ team members.
Delivered resilience and performance training to 200 personnel across 10 cohorts as a certified Level 2 facilitator.
Contributed as part of a curriculum team to a 58% reduction in training cycle time, maintaining 80 personnel records and coaching 12 teams.
Advised 20 mid-level and 40 senior leaders and assessed 400 student performances across audiences with widely differing levels of preparation.

Designed individual remediation plans and a blind dual-assessor evaluation process for at-risk students; achieved a 100% pass rate against the program's full testing standard. Distinguished Leader Award, Army Leadership Development Program (2010).
Managed HR administration and library operations for 40+ personnel; deployed in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom (2007).

projects.title: SIP — Systematic Instrumental Practice
projects.description: Android-first Flutter application for serious instrumental musicians. Uses FSRS-5 spaced repetition scheduling, Python/FastAPI backend, and py-fsrs. Grounded in doctoral dissertation applying Edwin Gordon's Music Learning Theory. Multi-model AI design council produced canonical design specification v1.0. In active development.

projects.title: Vagrant + Ansible VM Provisioning (WaV2T Capstone)
projects.description: Solo capstone project: provisioned a single VM via Vagrant, using an Ansible playbook customized from an instructor-provided template.
